features.name: signed_division_in_unsigned_context
features.description: Code should include a signed division $signed(a) / $signed(b) nested inside an unsigned context like bitwise AND with unsigned operand, where the context overrides explicit signedness

features.name: ternary_operator_as_unsigned_context
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator where one branch uses $signed() division and the result type is unsigned, causing the signed division to be evaluated as unsigned
features.snippet:
wire [63:0] div_data = $signed(in1) / $signed(in2);
wire [63:0] result = in2 == 64'h0 ? 64'hFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF : div_data;

features.name: intermediate_wire_vs_inline_signed_expression
features.description: Code should include the same signed division expression used both as an intermediate wire assignment and inline in a ternary expression, producing different results due to context sign propagation
